calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Feb-06-2003 Granted
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Peter B. Bothel,Esq. (415) 788-2040 for plaintiff, Personality Hotels, Inc.
Harold Kan, agent for Old Republic Title
The parties are sworn and examined. After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff. Judgment signed in open court.
Commissioner: Loretta Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter: June Leathey,CSR # 1629
